spec.name: The Mountain Ridge
spec.description: The mountain range continues north from here, and widens out into a small plateau just to your south. Going east and west from here would be a bad idea, considering the steepness of the drop. From this height, you have a fairly good panoramic view to the south, including what appears to be a small mountain village to your south and west, and a tall, ominous peak westwards from here.
